content:
| Templates & Systems | Toolkits, generators | Commercial license or community distro |
| Studio Services | Branding, media dev | ULTI.TOOL.MEDIA division / client-facing |

> All products can exist in layered forms:
> - Artistic
> - Functional
> - Academic
> - Commercial

We’ll define licensing options, packaging styles, pricing structures, and style guides per project type.

---

### V. | SYMBOL SYSTEM

All objects will receive:
- ARTIST ID glyph
- LOGIC glyph (Dream, Reality, Meta)
- DOMAIN glyph (Audio, Myth, Research, etc.)
- OUTPUT glyph (Artifact, Tool, Ritual, Curriculum)

#### Questions:
- Unicode/Emoji starters?
- ASCII-only?
